title: 9 Places a Man Actually Meets God
caption:
You don't meet God only on Sunday.

Most men are waiting for a mountaintop moment — a worship night, a conference, a feeling that finally makes it click. But He's been showing up in the ordinary the whole time: the 5 a.m. nobody saw, the apology you didn't want to make, the temptation you walked away from.

Grace doesn't wait for the highlight reel. It meets you in the wreckage, in the waiting room, in the quiet Tuesday you almost wasted.

Save this for the week you feel far from Him.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #scripture #disciplineequalsfreedom
theme: He meets you in the ordinary.
